question: Based on this product revenue chart (as of March 2024), what can we reasonably conclude about the latest year?

options.A: Online revenue has permanently collapsed in the latest year compared with earlier years.
options.B: The company must immediately overhaul its channel strategy because the latest year clearly shows a failed marketing mix.
options.C: All channels are performing much worse in the latest year than in previous years.
options.D: We cannot make a reliable judgment about the latest year's full performance because the data only cover the first part of the year.

explanation: The latest year includes only about 4 months of data, whereas earlier bars represent full-year totals. Stacking the partial-year totals next to full-year bars makes the latest year look dramatically worse across all channels, but this is a consequence of inappropriate aggregation of time, not a true performance collapse.
